message:
chore: add pool stats to Debug output and bump benchmark schema to v6

- database/pool.rs: include stats field in Debug impl for both DbPool
  and AsyncDbPool, making pool diagnostics visible in debug logging

- benches/raptorq_benchmark.rs: bump policy schema versions to v6
  (raptorq-track-e-dual-policy-v6, raptorq-track-e-dual-policy-probe-v6)
  to match the new DualKernelModeFallbackReason and override mask
  fields added in the prior gf256 commit.  Adds mode_fallback_reason
  and dual_policy_env_requested to the track E policy payload.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
